title: Minecraft But.. Stone Drops OP Items!
description: 🪨 Minecraft But.. Stone Drops OP Items!
body:
# 🪨💥 STONE JUST BROKE THE GAME!

# [Instagram ](https://www.instagram.com/shubham_._._96?igsh=M3djNndqczI5ejhi)

Ever thought mining stone could make you unstoppable?
This datapack flips Minecraft on its head ⚒️🔥

**✨ What happens?**
➤ Break normal stone
➤ Get INSANELY OP LOOT instead of boring drops 💎⚡
➤ Skip progression and jump straight into chaos 😈

**🧲 What kind of loot?**
✔ God-tier gear
✔ Rare blocks & treasures
✔ Powerful items that feel illegal 🚀

**🪄 Need normal stone?**
➤ Use Silk Touch and mine like vanilla 🧠

**🎮 Perfect for:**
⭐ Challenge worlds
⭐ YouTube / Shorts content
⭐ Players who love broken gameplay

⚠️ Warning: Balance is intentionally destroyed 😎🔥
